vulnerabilities.title: Prototype Pollution in sds
vulnerabilities.description: This affects the package sds from 0.0.0. The library could be tricked into adding or modifying properties of the Object.prototype by abusing the set function located in js/set.js. **Note:** This vulnerability derives from an incomplete fix to CVE-2020-7618

vulnerabilities.title: Prototype Pollution in sds
vulnerabilities.description:
Affected versions of `sds` are vulnerable to prototype pollution. The `set` function does not restrict the modification of an Object's prototype, which may allow an attacker to add or modify an existing property that will exist on all objects.

## Recommendation

Upgrade to version 4.0.0 or later
